DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JAMES CARLSON, Esq. of Kronenberger Rosenfeld, LLP (tel: 415-955-1155) for Plaintiff.
Atty. NICHOLAS SAENZ, Esq. of the Saenz Firm, P.C. (tel: 415-909-08260 for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT QUIMBIK, INC.'s DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Matter argued. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Quimbik, Inc.'s demurrer to the sole cause of action for breach of contract in the first amended complaint is overruled. The first amended complaint does not show on its face that plaintiff LCAO Tech LLC's breach of contract claim is time-barred. The allegations that Quimbik continued to work to finalize, or at least committed to do work to finalize, the websites and mobile application in 2021 and thereafter (e.g. FAC pars. 85-89, 93-94, 102-103, 108, 162) and never provided the contractually required acceptance document to establish the completion of its contract obligations (FAC pars. 25-26, 119-121) sufficiently allege that the contract remained executory and the breaches complained of (FAC pars. 163-166) occurred later than four years prior to the filing of this lawsuit.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)
